# Logos Papers Analysis Dashboard

This dashboard displays metrics from the analysis of the Logos Papers series.

---

## Run Analysis

Click the link below to run the analysis script. The results on this page will update automatically after the script finishes.

**Run Script:** [Execute Logos Papers Analysis](file:///D:/THEOPHYSICS_MASTER/00_VAULT_SYSTEM/Scripts/Data/Source/Theophysics_Assets/Scripts/run_logos_analysis.bat)

---

## Results

```dataviewjs
// This script reads the JSON file generated by the analyze_logos_papers.py script.
const path = "Theophysics_Assets/Dashboards/logos_papers_results.json";

const content = await dv.io.load(path);

if (content) {
    const data = JSON.parse(content);

    dv.header(2, "Logos Papers Metrics");
    dv.paragraph(`**Overall Coherence:** ${data.overall_coherence}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Last Run:** ${data.last_run}`);
    
    dv.header(3, "Key Concept Frequency");
    const conceptData = Object.entries(data.key_concepts).map(([concept, count]) => [concept, count]);
    dv.table(["Concept", "Count"], conceptData);

    dv.header(3, "Papers Flagged for Review");
    dv.list(data.papers_requiring_review);

} else {
    dv.paragraph("Could not load analysis results. Run the script to generate the data file.");
}
```
